name: agentcore-glitch-infrastructure
description: CDK infrastructure for AgentCore Glitch hybrid agent system

scripts.deploy:iam-first: cdk deploy GlitchAgentCoreIamStack --require-approval never && cdk deploy --all --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:iam-adopt: ROLE_ARN=arn:aws:iam::$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query Account --output text):role/GlitchAgentCoreRuntimeRole && cdk deploy GlitchAgentCoreIamStack -c glitchAgentCoreRoleArn=$ROLE_ARN --require-approval never && cdk deploy --all -c glitchAgentCoreRoleArn=$ROLE_ARN --require-approval never
